negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: common_sense_18772107-30c0-4c29-add5-0f3e4dc8ce3d
prompt: A medium shot captures two men interacting outdoors under a green mesh canopy supported by bamboo poles. The man on the left, wearing a white polo shirt with a pocket on the right chest, has thin rectangular glasses, short hair parted on the right side, a mustache, and a short white beard. He is slightly facing the right, engaging in conversation with the other man. As the scene progresses, he turns his head slightly downwards, placing his hands on his waist, then looks to the left, off-camera, and shifts his body to the right before facing forward again.  The man on the right, sporting black hair parted at the center and rectangular-framed glasses with thin black rims, is dressed in a long-sleeved light pink shirt with black stripes and a pocket on the right chest. His sleeves are rolled up to his elbows. Initially, he is facing forward with his head turned to the left, speaking animatedly with his hands stretched out in front of him. He then closes his mouth, clasps his hands near his chest, and opens his mouth with a slight smile while shifting to his left and facing the other man. He then moves to his right. Both men wear black microphones clipped to their shirts, and the scene is well-lit with natural sunlight. The background features dense greenery, including palm trees and smaller plants, with an open framework of piped natural material and an irregular green mesh fabric overhead. At the bottom, there is a white stand with potted plants and a black nylon bag.
